title: Nutty Gooey Moroccan Cashew Stir-fry
description: This solo-dinner moroccan dish features a nutty and gooey texture made with turmeric powder and slow-cooked for flavor.

ingredients.name: cashews
ingredients.amount: 1 cup soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Use full-fat coconut milk for richness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cashews and garlic, cooking until cashews are slightly toasted and fragrant.
Stir in onion and ginger, sautéing for about 5 minutes until softened.
Add turmeric powder and chili flakes (if using), stirring to coat all ingredients well.
Pour in coconut milk, bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-12 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Stir occasionally to prevent sticking, until the mixture thickens slightly into a gooey consistency.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
